summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for L'atelier Secret website - esthetics center in LeMoyne, Quebec. All key functionality tested including homepage sections, navigation dropdowns, booking form 3-step wizard, page navigation, mobile responsiveness, and SEO NAP information.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with hero section, services, testimonials, about, academy sections
Navigation menu with functional dropdowns (Services, Tarifs, Académie)
CTA 'Réserver maintenant' buttons visible and functional in header and hero
Booking form 3-step wizard works perfectly (personal info → service selection → date/time)
Booking form submission with mocked API (1.5s simulation) displays confirmation
Legacy .php route redirects functional (about.php, booking.php, contact.php, laser-hair.php)
Footer displays correct NAP for SEO: L'atelier Secret, 2475 Saint-Georges Street, LeMoyne, QC J4R 2T4, +1 438 882 2165
Mobile responsive navigation works with hamburger menu and dropdowns
Mobile booking form fully functional with proper form field visibility and interaction
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for automated testing
